narrative:
Truro Township has 19,840 registered voters, with 62.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.0%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.4 percentage points.
